initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    customers.Segment,
    (MAX(CASE WHEN substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN yearmonth.Consumption END) - 
     MAX(CASE WHEN substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN yearmonth.Consumption END)) * 100.0 / 
    NULLIF(MAX(CASE WHEN substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN yearmonth.Consumption END), 0) AS pct_increase
FROM customers
JOIN yearmonth ON customers.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
  AND substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
GROUP BY customers.Segment
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    customers.Segment,
    (MAX(CASE WHEN substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN yearmonth.Consumption END) - 
     MAX(CASE WHEN substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN yearmonth.Consumption END)) * 100.0 / 
     MAX(CASE WHEN substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN yearmonth.Consumption END) AS pct_increase
FROM customers
JOIN yearmonth ON customers.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
  AND substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
GROUP BY customers.Segment
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 3;

WITH consumption_2012 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption_2012
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2012'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
consumption_2013 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption_2013
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
pct_increase AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(c2012.Segment, c2013.Segment) AS Segment,
        COALESCE(c2012.total_consumption_2012, 0) AS consumption_2012,
        COALESCE(c2013.total_consumption_2013, 0) AS consumption_2013,
        CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(c2012.total_consumption_2012, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE (COALESCE(c2013.total_consumption_2013, 0) - COALESCE(c2012.total_consumption_2012, 0)) * 100.0 / COALESCE(c2012.total_consumption_2012, 0)
        END AS pct_increase
    FROM consumption_2012 c2012
    FULL OUTER JOIN consumption_2013 c2013 ON c2012.Segment = c2013.Segment
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    pct_increase
FROM pct_increase
WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 3;

        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption_2012
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID

consumption_2013 AS (

        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption_2013
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
segment_comparison AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(c2012.Segment, c2013.Segment) AS Segment,
        COALESCE(c2012.total_consumption_2012, 0) AS consumption_2012,
        COALESCE(c2013.total_consumption_2013, 0) AS consumption_2013,
        CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(c2012.total_consumption_2012, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE (COALESCE(c2013.total_consumption_2013, 0) - COALESCE(c2012.total_consumption_2012, 0)) * 100.0 / COALESCE(c2012.total_consumption_2012, 0)
        END AS pct_increase
    FROM consumption_2012 c2012
    FULL OUTER JOIN consumption_2013 c2013 ON c2012.Segment = c2013.Segment
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    pct_increase
FROM segment_comparison
WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 3;

candidates.sql:
WITH consumption_by_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    CASE 
        WHEN consumption_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / consumption_2012
    END AS pct_increase
FROM consumption_by_segment
WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 3;

WITH consumption_by_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    CASE 
        WHEN consumption_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / consumption_2012
    END AS pct_increase
FROM consumption_by_segment
WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    customers.Segment,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 7) BETWEEN '2013-01' AND '2013-12' THEN yearmonth.Consumption END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 7) BETWEEN '2012-01' AND '2012-12' THEN yearmonth.Consumption END)) * 100.0 / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 7) BETWEEN '2012-01' AND '2012-12' THEN yearmonth.Consumption END) AS pct_increase
FROM customers
JOIN yearmonth ON customers.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY customers.Segment
HAVING pct_increase IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 3;
